name: search_evolve
description: Systematic web search and knowledge evolution: retrieve, validate, and compile new knowledge chapters from authoritative sources.
trigger: When user requests a direction search, citation tracking, or algorithm synthesis.

priority_matrix.P0: ArXiv papers & top-venue publications (must have real ArXiv ID or venue)
priority_matrix.P1: Official tech whitepapers & vendor docs (OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, etc.)
priority_matrix.P2: High-star GitHub repositories with reference implementations
priority_matrix.P3: Expert-level deep blog posts (HF Blog, Lilian Weng, etc.)
priority_matrix.P4: Social media fragments (Twitter/X) — news leads only, never cite as derivation source

required: Rigorous math derivations with defined variables
Runnable PyTorch code with import torch and shape annotations
Real citations with year and ArXiv link

raw_sources.rule: Before condensing retrieved material into the note, persist each source there as NN_<slug>.md (key excerpt + source URL + retrieval date + priority P0-P4), plus a _manifest.md index. Reference only: never register in INDEX_KB.md, never render to HTML.
